artworks.title: Between Worlds
artworks.description: A luminous figure stands at the threshold between the visible and the unknown. Surrounded by watchful, otherworldly guides, she becomes a portrait of inner awakening — the quiet moment when fear gives way to self-recognition.

artworks.title: The Woman You Keep Hidden
artworks.description:
Inside you lives a woman you suppress. She is free, bold, passionate, and inconvenient. You’re afraid to be her — but she holds the key to your wholeness.

This painting is the voice of the woman you’re afraid to show. She is wild. Passionate. Free. The one you’ve silenced again and again — but she never stops knocking.

The longer you suppress her, the louder she screams. And one day, she breaks through — in dance, in tears, in rage, in art.

Set on a chessboard — a metaphor for the life we try to calculate too carefully: Let her out. Let yourself be seen. Let yourself feel.

artworks.title: The Art of Not Falling Apart
The Loudest Soul in the Room
Love Is the Beginning. Love Is the End.
Between Fire and Water
artworks.description: Two forces move beside one another: one charged with heat and urgency, the other with depth and surrender. Together they become a portrait of balance — the place where passion meets stillness and transformation begins.
